name: one-file-tools
description: A collection of useful developer tools, each built as a single HTML file.

scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('node_modules/husky')){console.error('\x1b[31m%s\x1b[0m','ERROR: node_modules not found. Please run npm install first.');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('node_modules/husky')){console.error('\x1b[31m%s\x1b[0m','ERROR: node_modules not found. Please run npm install first.');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.sort: node scripts/sort-norm.js data/tools.json && node scripts/sort-norm.js data/themes.json && node scripts/sort-norm.js data/quests.json && node scripts/sort-norm.js data/quizzes.json && node scripts/sort-norm.js data/design-system.json && node scripts/sort-norm.js data/instruments.json

author: Praveen Kumar Purushothaman <praveen@praveen.science> (https://praveen.science)
